exercises.title: Fiber vs Satellite Loss Calculator
exercises.description: Compare loss between fiber and satellite channels at various distances.
tasks: Calculate crossover distance where satellite wins
Plot loss vs distance for both
exercises.expectedOutput: Loss comparison tool with crossover analysis

exercises.title: Satellite Link Budget Calculator
exercises.description: Build a comprehensive satellite QKD link budget calculator.
tasks: Vary zenith angle and show impact
hints: Geometric: depends on telescope size and wavelength
Total = sum of all loss components

exercises.title: Orbit Coverage Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze LEO satellite visibility and coverage for QKD.
tasks: Determine revisit time for ground station
hints: Visibility depends on altitude and minimum elevation

exercises.title: Protocol Comparison Tool
exercises.description: Compare prepare-measure vs entanglement-based satellite QKD.
tasks: Model key rate for prepare-measure protocol
Model key rate for entanglement distribution
hints: Prepare-measure: simpler, higher rate, needs trust
Entanglement: more complex, no trust needed
Consider both single-ground and two-ground scenarios
